project_type: Python + MQL5 AI Trading EA for MetaTrader 5
test_framework: pytest (tests/ directory), backtester for strategy validation
verification_instructions: Run the backtester and check that win rate > 55%, profit factor > 1.2, trade count reduced significantly from 12,777
setup_instructions: pip install numpy pandas ta yfinance (already installed)
environment_constraints: No torch/scikit-learn installed - backtest.py uses pure momentum logic and does not need ML models. yfinance available for downloading gold data. No broker CSV data file available - must use yfinance mode.
contribution_requirements: The `input` keyword is RESERVED in MQL5. SYMBOL_SPREAD is ENUM_SYMBOL_INFO_INTEGER. Candle patterns should only LOG never BLOCK on M1. System must remain 100% self-tuning. Gold price range $4200-4800. RoboForex variable spreads 5-20 points XAUUSD.
key_patterns: Backtester in backtest.py uses constants at top of file for SL, trailing, cooldown, etc. Signal generator in strategies/signal_generator.py mirrors these but adds ML timing. Config in config/settings.py holds all dataclass configs. Auto-optimizer adjusts params every N trades.
directory_structure: python_bridge/ contains all Python code. strategies/ has signal_generator, risk_manager, auto_optimizer, regime_detector. config/ has settings.py. data/ has market data fetchers. models/ has ML models (not used in backtest). tests/ has unit tests.
